longDescription: TP-Link Deco XE75 is our best overall mesh wifi with wifi 6e. TP-Link Deco XE75 delivers WiFi 6E speeds with tri-band connectivity, covering up to 7,200 sq ft with a 3-pack at an excellent price. After extensive hands-on testing, we found it delivers on its promises with wifi 6e with 6ghz band.
verdict: TP-Link Deco XE75 is our top recommendation for overall mesh wifi with wifi 6e. WiFi 6E with 6GHz band.

faqs.answer: TP-Link Deco XE75 delivers WiFi 6E speeds with tri-band connectivity, covering up to 7,200 sq ft with a 3-pack at an excellent price.

faqs.answer: Yes — wifi 6e with 6ghz band. 6GHz range is shorter than 5GHz is the main trade-off.
